inputs.label: Carats
inputs.businessContext: The weight in carats (ct) to be converted to grams.

businessContext_i18n.en: The weight in carats (ct) to be converted to grams.
businessContext_i18n.de: Das Gewicht in Karat (ct), das in Gramm umgerechnet werden soll.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: The conversion factor from carats to grams. Standard is 0.2 g/ct. Adjust if needed for non-standard carats.

businessContext_i18n.en: The conversion factor from carats to grams. Standard is 0.2 g/ct. Adjust if needed for non-standard carats.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Karattan grama dönüşüm faktörü. Standart 0,2 g/ct'dir. Standart olmayan karatlar için gerekiyorsa ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Umrechnungsfaktor von Karat in Gramm. Standard ist 0,2 g/ct. Bei nicht standardmäßigen Karat anpassen.

inputs.label: Batch Size
inputs.businessContext: Number of items being converted, if multiple items of the same carat weight.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of items being converted, if multiple items of the same carat weight.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aynı karat ağırlığında birden fazla öğe varsa, dönüştürülen öğe sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der umzurechnenden Artikel, wenn mehrere Artikel das gleiche Karatgewicht haben.

inputs.label: Decimal Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the output. Minimum 0.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for the output. Minimum 0.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çıktı için ondalık basamak sayısı. Minimum 0.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für die Ausgabe. Minimum 0.

inputs.label: Price per Gram
inputs.businessContext: Optional: price per gram to calculate total value. Leave as 0 to ignore.

businessContext_i18n.en: Optional: price per gram to calculate total value. Leave as 0 to ignore.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İsteğe bağlı: toplam değeri hesaplamak için gram başına fiyat. Yoksaymak için 0 bırakın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Optional: Preis pro Gramm zur Berechnung des Gesamtwerts. Auf 0 setzen, um zu ignorieren.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
